title: Shchukin Collection Archive — Master Entity Register

evidence_tiers.Family-asserted: stated publicly by family/gallery, not independently corroborated
evidence_tiers.Estate: from family/estate records, not on the open web

entities.name: Ivan Vasilyevich Shchukin
entities.note: Old-Believer Moscow textile magnate (I.V. Shchukin & Sons; ~4M gold roubles). m. Ekaterina Botkina. Father of the four collector-brothers.

entities.name: Pyotr Ivanovich Shchukin
entities.collected: Russian antiquities, textiles, jewelry, Eastern & applied art; some Impressionists
entities.note: Built the Shchukin Museum of Russian Antiquities (Malaya Gruzinskaya); donated to the Historical Museum 1905. Owned Pissarro 'Place du Théâtre Français' (1898), Renoir 'Nude Seated on a Sofa' (1876).

entities.name: Sergei Ivanovich Shchukin
entities.note: 50 Picasso, 41 Matisse, 17 Gauguin, 16 Derain, 13 Monet, 8 Cézanne, 4 Van Gogh + long tail. Nationalised 5 Nov 1918 → First Museum of New Western Painting → GMNZI → 1948 Hermitage/Pushkin split.

entities.name: Dmitri Ivanovich Shchukin
entities.note: 'Moscow's best Old Masters.' Bruegel, Avercamp, Heda, J. van Ruisdael. Donated 19 pictures 1903. Later head of Italian painting dept (1924). Porcelain → Kuskovo.

entities.name: Ivan Ivanovich Shchukin
entities.collected: Impressionist paintings; Spanish Old Masters (El Greco, Goya circle)
entities.note: Paris from 1893; writer/critic; salon at 91 av. de Wagram (Rodin, Degas, Renoir, Redon, Huysmans, Durand-Ruel). Introduced Pyotr & Sergei to French art. Suicide 1908. Owned Monet 'Lilac in the Sun' (1872).

entities.name: Nikolai Vasilyevich Shchukin
entities.location: Family / estate; exhibited NY, Paris, Moscow
entities.note: Founder of Gallery SHCHUKIN (1987); former psychoanalyst. Collection of Marina & Nikolai: Malevich, Kandinsky, Goncharova, Larionov, Popova, Suetin, Rozanova, Exter, Chagall. Lineage to historic Shchukins = family-asserted, not genealogically corroborated. Dates/patronymic/NACFUND-1997 = estate records.
entities.sources: galleryshchukin.com; PRNewswire 2014; Arte Fuse; Say Who; family/estate

entities.name: Gallery SHCHUKIN
entities.note: Paris on Avenue Matignon (Oct 2013); NY Chelsea→Murray Hill. Collaborations: Tretyakov, Museum of the East. Artists incl. Datuna, Semenov, Garunov, Migachev, Zaloznaya, Tishin.

entities.name: National Art Collections Foundation (NACFUND)
entities.note: Non-profit component of Gallery SHCHUKIN per the gallery's own statement; founding year 1997 from estate records.

entities.name: Marina Shchukin
entities.note: Avant-garde collection associated jointly with 'Marina and Nikolay Shchukin' in the 2014 Drutt exhibition record.

entities.name: Dmitry Shchukin
entities.note: 15+ yrs brand development of Gallery SHCHUKIN. Projects: 'Copies of Russian Museums' Masterpieces', 'Open Museum', album 'Art of Russia: Present, Future' (Art Moscow 2002), avant-garde shows Moscow 2003–04. Fairs via Leila Heller (Hamptons, Art Wynwood, Palm Beach).
